comments.body: 99% of the time the cause is in your code, or your Spring bean wiring configuration. Please edit your post and include the complete stack trace. There's nowhere near enough information here for your post to be on-topic.
@JimGarrison I have also added the stacktrace.

answers.body:
Instead of in :organizations use in (:organizations).

Also remove @Param("organizations") and value = yagni

And use an Iterable, not an List cause of immutability.

Hey, is a organization an contact? May you mix different entities? What is this method about at all? There are no aggregations from my pov.

comments.body: That fixes it for me too although you example doesn't seem enough to reproduce the problem in isolation, there must be something else going on but I'm not sure what it is.

answers.body:
I have solved this issue by changing fetch mode from @Fetch(FetchMode.SUBSELECT) to @Fetch(FetchMode.SELECT)

@Entity
@Table(name = "foo_container")
@DiscriminatorValue(value = "CONTAINER")
public class FooContainer extends Foo {

    @OneToMany(mappedBy = "containerId", fetch = FetchType.EAGER)
    @Fetch(FetchMode.SELECT)
    @BatchSize(size = 20)
    @OrderBy("id")
    private Set<Foo> nested = new LinkedHashSet<>();
}

title: NullPointerException in Hibernate Query: "org.hibernate.sql.ast.spi.SqlAstProcessingState.getSqlExpressionResolver()" is null
body:
I'm experiencing a NullPointerException while executing a Hibernate query in a Spring Boot application. The issue seems to occur deep within the Hibernate framework, as indicated by the stack trace:

java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.hibernate.sql.ast.spi.SqlAstProcessingState.getSqlExpressionResolver()" because the return value of "org.hibernate.query.sqm.sql.BaseSqmToSqlAstConverter.getCurrentProcessingState()" is null

This exception is thrown when invoking a custom repository method named _loadAggregatedOrganizations. The method is designed to process a list of entities based on another list of entities. The entities are part of a complex inheritance structure and have various relationships.

I suspect the issue might be related to how Hibernate processes the query with these entities, particularly with regards to their relationships or inheritance mapping.

  • Method in Repository:
@EntityGraph(value = "Organization.loadAggregatedData", type = EntityGraph.EntityGraphType.FETCH)
@Query(value = "SELECT o FROM Organization o where o in :organizations")
List<Organization> _loadAggregatedOrganizations(@Param("organizations") List<? extends Contact> organizations);

I am using Hibernate version [6.2.13.Final], Spring Boot version [3.1.4], Spring Data JPA Version [3.0.9], Spring Framework Version [6.0.13]. I've checked the configuration and mappings but couldn't find any obvious misconfigurations. This issue arises specifically with a Jakarta packages with Java 17, when I downgrade to (traditional javax.* packages) with lower dependency versions which supports javax.* it works fine.

Can someone help me understand the root cause of this NullPointerException and how to resolve it? Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated.
